studies.title: Internet-based prevention of Major Depression
studies._matched_query: "HelloBetter Schlafen" AND "GET.ON Institut für Online Gesundheitstrainings"

_verification.reason: The study is about the GET.ON Stimmung (GET.ON Mood) intervention, which is different from the HelloBetter Schlafen product. The study focuses on depression prevention, not sleep improvement.
